description: In the SRS (Software Requirements Specification) document of the open project, perform a functional decomposition of a new performance requirement. Create a high-level requirement at the end of the document with the description 'System Performance'. Nest three child requirements under 'System Performance' with the following descriptions: 'The system shall respond to API requests within 200ms.', 'The system shall support 500 concurrent user sessions.', and 'The system shall maintain 99.9% uptime during business hours.' Save the project.
